emails.subject_base: Gas Books - found some small duplicates in the spreadsheet
emails.body: Kam, We created the real portfolios of all these books as well. We are waiting on the hierarchy from Risk Controls. If that is delayed, then we will simply dump all the real portfolios under a root portfolio for purposes of testing potential exposure, credit reserve and VaR. Regards, Ramesh
